response.original_title: ムチムチ泡姫同士のソープテク対決！！ 巨乳レズソープファイト2
response.overview: The high-stakes sequel to the popular lesbian soapland series. Three of the industry’s most famous stars—Aimi Yoshikawa, Asahi Mizuno, and Mizuna Wakatsuki—compete in a 'No-Guard' technical battle to determine who is the ultimate number one. Set in a luxury lesbian soapland, the performers go head-to-head using soap, lotion, and intense mutual stimulation. It’s a pride-filled clash of heavy friction and 'chubby' physiques where the only goal is to make the other person climax first.
response.tagline: A battle of skill and pride: Who will be crowned the number one queen?
response.title: Curvy Soapland Queens' A Battle of Technique! Big Breast Lesbian Soap Fight 2
